title: Additional Files for COL6A1 expression predicts poor prognosis in pancreatic cancer
author: Owusu-Ansah, Kwabena Gyabaah
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
1. Additional File 1. - S1_STR confirmation for BxPC-M8 after establishment from parent BxPC-3
